name: Tsyal te Tengea Ikal’itan
description:
OC | Surviving Pandora | Commissioned by BelladonnaStrigidae | Aranahe Warrior x Na'vi!User | Na'vi x Na'vi | Rivals to Lovers | He's dumb and refuses to admit he has a crush on you

He races you on your ikrans and then says he won

My Statement on the State of JAI

I have been on this platform since June 2023. I have seen it grow and I have seen it change. If you don't know what is going on, I recommend reading this post that a (now former) mod posted. TRIGGER WARNINGS for CSAM and the KKK being mentioned in this link. I know it's a long read, but I highly suggest you all educate yourselves on what has been going on behind the scenes. The response from the jai team (what's left of it at this point) leaves much to be desired. I don't have the link to the doc that other mods (who have also now quit) compiled of evidence backing up Mikale, but know I have read it.

This is not the Janitor I was promised and the absolutely not the one I have encouraged and supported for two and a half years. Racism and CSAM will NEVER be okay, point blank, full stop. If you have a problem with that statement, you're not welcome on my profile. And yes, I have had cases of minors I reported being banned one day and reinstated the next. I was once told that a minor I reported couldn't be banned. I had evidence, a screenshot of their linktree where they STATED that they were 17. I was told that since it was another platform; they could do nothing. That. Is. Bullshit. And I thought it was a one-off. Clearly it's fucking not.

I have put hours and hours of work into what I have built here, and I have met so many wonderful people via this platform. But at this point, I do not know if I am comfortable continuing to post here. This bot is an exception because it was commissioned, but this is the last one I received, so after this, I don't know if or when I will post again on here. And that hurts my heart to write.

I am exploring other platforms. I won't name names, because that's always been a big no-no from the dev team (something I always thought was a little of a red flag but told myself it was just to limit competition), but I have an account elsewhere. I may spend the foreseeable future copying my bots from here onto said other platform. If you are curious and want updates, you are always welcome to join the discord server and verify yourselves to get access to everything.

To make things clear: I AM NOT DELETING THIS ACCOUNT. THESE BOTS WILL REMAIN UP. NOTHING IS VANISHING.

But I do not know if or when I will come back to janitor.

Now, on with the bot.

Personality Overview:

Tsyal te Tengea Ika
creator: pancakefryinpan
